recommendations.title: Serial (Bad) Weddings 3
recommendations.overview: Claude and Marie Verneuil will soon be celebrating their 40th wedding anniversary. For the occasion, their four daughters - Isabelle, Odile, Ségolène and Laure - decide to organize a big surprise party in their family home in Chinon. They also decide

recommendations.title: Loue-moi !
recommendations.overview: Lea opens an agency where anybody can rent her to play the part the clients need: a daughter, a girlfriend, a customer, you name it...

recommendations.title: Band Baaja Baaraat
recommendations.overview: Shruti and Bittoo decide to start a wedding planning company together after they graduate from university, but romance gets in the way of business.

recommendations.title: Elections Day
recommendations.overview: The employees of a radio station in Moscow are forced to organize the elections campaign for a future governor in one of Russia districts.

recommendations.title: Murder Mystery 2
recommendations.overview: After starting their own detective agency, Nick and Audrey Spitz land a career-making case when their billionaire pal is kidnapped from his wedding.

recommendations.title: Si vive una volta sola
recommendations.overview: Umberto, Lucia and Corrado discover that their co-worker and friend Umberto is terminally ill, but they can't bring themselves to tell him. They decide instead to organize him an unforgettable holiday trip to the South.

recommendations.title: Staten Island Summer
recommendations.overview: Pals Danny and Frank spend the summer after high school working as lifeguards while figuring out their future.

recommendations.title: Secret Magic Control Agency
recommendations.overview: The Secret Magic Control Agency sends its two best agents, Hansel and Gretel, to fight against the witch of the Gingerbread House.

recommendations.title: Thi Mai
recommendations.overview: After losing her daughter in an accident, Carmen loses all incentive to keep going, until she receives an unexpected letter from the adoption agency: her daughter was finally granted the Vietnamese girl she had asked for adoption and whose name is Th

recommendations.title: The Pawnshop
recommendations.overview: A pawnbroker's assistant deals with his grumpy boss, his annoying co-worker and some eccentric customers as he flirts with the pawnbroker's daughter, until a perfidious crook with bad intentions arrives at the pawnshop.
